basic_details.job_title: GHSS Ambaguda Guest Faculties Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Government Higher Secondary School Ambaguda (GHSS Ambaguda) Recruitment 2026: Government Higher Secondary School Ambaguda is conducting a Walk-in Interview for Guest Faculties posts. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for eligible candidates to attend the interview directly without any prior online application.

qualification.details: Retired Govt. / Non-Govt., Aided teachers below 65 years of age Fresh candidates who have secured minimum 50% marks in PG in respective subject. B.Ed. Degree (except in Logic/ Philosophy, Sociology subjects) and PGDCA will be given weightage.

salary_details.details: Guest Faculties: ₹400 per class subject to a maximum of 50 classes in a month.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for GHSS Ambaguda Recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for Guest Faculties at Government Higher Secondary School Ambaguda is scheduled for 12th June 2026. Candidates are advised to report at the venue before 8:45 AM on the specified date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the Guest Faculties post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Post Graduate (PG) degree in the respective subject with a minimum of 50% marks. A B.Ed. degree and PGDCA will be given weightage, except for Logic/Philosophy and Sociology subjects.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to the Guest Faculties position?
faq.answer: The age limit for applying is below 65 years of age. This applies to both retired teachers and fresh candidates applying for the Guest Faculties position.

faq.question: Q4. How much salary will be paid to the selected Guest Faculties?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will be paid ₹400 per class. However, there is a maximum limit of 50 classes per month for the salary calculation.

faq.question: Q5. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates need to bring their complete Bio-data, two passport size photographs, and all original certificates and mark sheets from HSC to PG, along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive. Candidates can attend the walk-in interview without paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Guest Faculties post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Guest Faculties post will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates will be assessed based on their qualifications and performance during the interview.

faq.question: Q8. Can retired teachers apply for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, retired Government, Non-Government, and Aided teachers below 65 years of age are eligible to apply for the Guest Faculties position.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Guest Faculties position at GHSS Ambaguda is on a Contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Government Higher Secondary School Ambaguda, AMBAGUDA, Odisha, 764055.
